description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 15 hrs 19 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 7 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most time in Other (39%) and Java (31%), followed by Markdown (15%) and TypeScript (8%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data for this week.
